nodes.name: Campephaga
nodes.summary: Campephaga（Campephaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如黑鹃鵙、红腹鹃鵙、红肩鹃鵙等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: 黑鹃鵙
nodes.summary: The black cuckooshrike (Campephaga flava) is a species of bird in the cuckooshrike family Campephagidae. The species is closely related to Petit's cuckooshrike and the red-shouldered cuckooshrike, and forms a superspecies with them. It is also known as the African black cuckooshrike. It is found in Angola, Botswana, Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Eswatini, Ethiopia, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Namibia, Rwanda, Somalia, South Africa, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Black Cuckooshrike - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
